unit_definition: (dataset, method in {erm, cigl_graph_node}, seed, fold); align_k2=graph_z k=2; R3=label_conditional task_drop k=2

graph_kl_pooled.reason: per-fold graph_kl for seeds 1/2 pruned (raw audit .npz + r2-gate JSONs not committed on any branch); only seed0 recomputable via r1_hardened_nperm1000.csv

note: align_k2 (the right-sign result) reproduces exactly at n=126; graph_kl (wrong-sign) reproduces in SIGN at seed0 (n=42), pooled n=126 carried from frozen output because per-fold graph_kl for seeds 1/2 was pruned. This is a provenance limit, not a mismatch.
